scripts.preview: opennextjs-cloudflare build --config wrangler.jsonc && opennextjs-cloudflare preview --config wrangler.jsonc
scripts.deploy: opennextjs-cloudflare build --config wrangler.production.jsonc && opennextjs-cloudflare deploy --config wrangler.production.jsonc
scripts.upload: opennextjs-cloudflare build --config wrangler.production.jsonc && opennextjs-cloudflare upload --config wrangler.production.jsonc
